alt: A mandrill nibbling a flower it is holding in its hand
caption: Mandrills forage for fruit, seeds, leaves, and flowers, using their hands to bring food to their mouths.
attributionText: Photo by Brocken Inaglory via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 3.0

acquisitionNotes: Replaced earlier diet image that showed mandrill genitalia (not suitable for a kids' site). Manually verified mandrill feeding image for diet. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/2/20/Mandrill_and_flower.jpg
